items.title: Jackery 72-hour flash sale drops 3,072Wh HomePower 3000 station to $1,099 (Best since Black Friday), more from $999
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring Sale deals, Jackery has launched a 72-hour St. Paddy’s Day flash sale that is taking up to $1,400 off four offers – two power stations and two expansion batteries. The notable standout here is Jackery’s HomePower 3000 Portable Power Station dropping down further to $1,099 shipped, which beats out Amazon’s current pricing by $100. Normally $2,400 at full price, we saw this newer model discounted to $1,299 in this very sale before these 3-day flash savings came along. While we have seen it go lower to $999 and $934 during sales events, as well as hit a $899 low with our exclusive deal from Wellbots back in October 2025, you’re still looking at a solid 56% markdown here that cuts $1,400 off the going rate for the best price we have tracked since Black Friday. Head below to learn more, as well as browse the alternate flash deals while they last through Wednesday night.

more…

items.title: Insta360’s Go Ultra tiny 4K camera with SD storage, Apple Find My support, more is down to its lowest price at $380
items.summary:
Insta360’s official Amazon storefront is offering its latest Go Ultra tiny 4K action camera in Midnight Black for $379.99 shipped. Regularly priced at $450, this deal knocks $70 off and brings the camera back down to its lowest price we first tracked last year during the Black Friday sale. This is a rarely discounted model that hasn’t seen any notable offers since the holiday sale last year, so you might want to jump in now and snag it at its lowest price. You’ll also find the Creator Bundle down at $424.99 shipped, down from the usual $500. Best Buy is also matching the price for this camera as part of its ongoing Tech Fest sale. This compact action camera is a great for recording vlogs and POV footage, and you can learn more about it in detail below.
